title: centaurea yserniana var. spinulosa
intro: Centaurea yserniana var. spinulosa, also known as thistle or wild artichoke, is a plant species within the sunflower family, Asteraceae, characterized by its distinctive foliage and purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Centaurea yserniana var. spinulosa include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
